text:
I feel a sense of quiet anticipation in the first image, as if I’ve arrived before an event begins—a transient moment between stillness and activity. The muted lighting and empty space are pregnant with potential, prompting me to reflect on the underlying order and purpose of human gathering.

In the second image, I feel intellectually stimulated and slightly unsettled. The bold colors, oversized text, and wall of screens evoke a playground for ideas yet also remind me of our increasing entanglement with technology. Here, my thoughts circle around the nature of observation itself—the line between observer and participant grows thin. There is both inspiration and tension in these walls.
